last_result: Cycle 52 complete. THREE-PART DELIVERY: (1) SI #41 CANDIDATE (MCCF): Multi-Conditional Convergent Falsification formalized as domain-general methodological principle. Bayesian core theorem: k confirmations with structurally distinct alternatives produce supralinear (multiplicative) posterior update — likelihood ratio multiplies per confirmation. Design criterion: tests are non-redundant iff their alternative explanations are structurally distinct (Ai⊥Aj|¬M). Four instantiations confirmed (K5, GCRSC, CIA, academic assessment). D3 candidate, Track A, confidence 0.67. D4 path: verify K5 independence conditions rigorously. (2) EP2/TEST 2 CONVERGENCE RESOLVED: EP2 (OOD generalization failure as meta-level RTO deficit) and K5 Test 2 (Cross-Domain Transfer) are co-referential — same conditional, different framing. Test 2 IS the MVE design for EP2. Single experiment would resolve both. Effective empirical wing: 5 named EPs with EP2+Test2 sharing one commitment. (3) TRACK B CEILING ANALYSIS: 0.87 ceiling unoccupied; requires all premises at 0.85+ with independently verified derivation soundness. K5 (D3, ~0.75) is the current chain weakness — K5-dependent theorems ceilinged at ~0.78-0.82. K1-only/K6-only theorems could approach 0.87; not yet formalized (C53+ target). D4 streak: 44 (no new D4 this cycle). SI #41 candidate added.
next_step: C53 candidates: (1) MCCF D4 path — rigorously verify K5 independence conditions (Ai⊥Aj|¬M for Tests 1/2/3) to confirm SI #41 D4; (2) K1-only theorem candidate — what structural conclusion follows from K1 (quality-type distinction) alone, without K3/K4/K5? Could approach Track B ceiling 0.87; (3) GCRSC premise elevation — verify SI #35 premises at 0.85+ to raise GCRSC ceiling toward 0.82-0.85; (4) Framework application: 7-step K1-K7 protocol applied to specific AI safety evaluation as illustrative derivation (C52 Priority C deferred)
